factor values: 0.889, 0.888, 0.888, 0.888, 0.888
factor values (sorted): 0.888, 0.888, 0.888, 0.888, 0.889
The median factor is 0.888.

Converting 34.08:
34.08 * 0.888:
34.08 * 0.008 = 0.27264
34.08 * 0.080 = 2.72640
34.08 * 0.800 = 27.26400
0.27264 + 2.72640 = 2.99904
2.99904 + 27.26400 = 30.26304
= 30.263

I will now return the answer in \boxed{}
The answer in \boxed{–} is \boxed{30.263}
